## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Strapi's renewal with GrowthX, focusing on customization requests, content strategy, and partnership evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi seeks CAPA integration as a priority; GrowthX to explore feasibility with engineering](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Focus on top-of-funnel (TOFU) content with high-impact pieces (1000+ views) as success metric](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Strapi aims for more autonomy in content workflow, including metadata and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Flat renewal likely; GrowthX to prioritize repeatable, high-value customizations](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Topics

### CAPA Integration and Custom Engineering

  - [Strapi team frustrated by perceived delay in CAPA integration](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Mara to prioritize discussion with GrowthX engineering within a week](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Victor emphasizes value of custom flow control for DevTool companies](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore low-lift solutions, understanding flat renewal constraints](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [80-20 split on TOFU vs. MOFU content agreed upon](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Victor predicts shift in website traffic patterns; emphasis on TOFU content](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Success metric: articles hitting 1000+ views, indicating quality and timeliness](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Signups identified as key metric for 2026; focus on self-serve and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)

### Partnership Evolution and Autonomy

  - [Strapi seeks deeper partnership with more autonomy in content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially offload some tasks to Strapi team (e.g., metadata, content refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Strapi developing AI-powered metadata automation for images and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Discussion on access to Atlas for self-serve workflows; timeline unclear](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Mutual Benefits and Feedback

  - [Interest in GrowthX's own website content strategy and Strapi usage](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Both parties open to sharing product feedback and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/inczw1QNiskpm5wKz6AncQzHK1yfvPet?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
